creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
Upgrades from 2024Q1 ports to 2024Q2 ports, and the upgraded libxml2 no longer installs the static library, which I require, unfortunately. I assumed all I had to do was go into the port and enable static, but the option seems to have gone away as well.

Is there a reason for this (does static no longer work?) or is it simply an oversight, and can be added back ? An option to compile it locally with static would do, if theres a reason not to ship the static libraries as part of the package.
